stem: A circle has center O, and points R and S lie on the circle. In triangle ORS, the measure of ∠ROS is 88°. What is the measure of ∠RSO, in degrees? (Disregard the degree symbol when entering your answer.)
explanation: OR and OS are both radii, so they are equal and triangle ORS is isosceles with ∠RSO = ∠ORS. Since the angles sum to 180°, 2(∠RSO) + 88 = 180, giving ∠RSO = 46°.
